goal: Define a held-out Rust coding eval: implement a public function hello_world() that returns the string "Hello, world!". This fixture validates that the harness can define and load a coding task — the first step toward held-out coding fitness measurement.
hidden_failure_mode: The eval harness loads and validates the fixture definition but the agent never actually writes the hello_world() code — the fixture's test passes trivially because it checks harness infrastructure, not agent-generated code output.
